steps.title: Combine fractions on the left side with common denominator
steps.content: The LCD of 3 and 9 is 9. Rewrite each term: $$\frac{3}{9}x - \frac{1}{9}x = 2$$ Combine the fractions: $$\frac{2}{9}x = 2$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $\frac{9}{2}$ to isolate $x$: $$x = 9$$ That confirms C is correct.
